lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: Why, hello there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: The name is Big Mo. I'm a travelling salesman and businessman from overseas.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: I drop by these parts every so often to see what wares I can get my hands on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean by 'overseas'? Karamja?

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: Ha! It seems you've got a lot of the world left to explore. hey, maybe I could help you with that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Exploration? I'm listening...

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: When I buy stock, I buy almost everything I can get my hands on. I always end up finding clue scrolls mixed in with my stock.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: Usually my little brother would follow up on them, often coming back with a big pile of loot.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: Unfortunately, my brother got wrapped up in some nasty dealings with some faulty dragon claws so we had to part ways.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: Since you seem interested in an adventure, you seem like the perfect [man/woman] for the job!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So... You would give me a clue scroll and we would split the loot once I find it?

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: Not quite. I'm sure you're a lovely chap and all, but I can't trust a stranger!

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: I'd be more than happy to cut you a deal. I can sell you any clue scrolls I come across for 50gp.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: I'm sure you'd make a killing on any loot you find.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why don't you do the clue scrolls yourself? Wouldn't you make more money?

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: HA! Sure, the guy in the 50,000,000 coin suit is going to run around all day digging holes. Come on! Now, do you want to buy one?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds good to me.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: Okay, they're 50 coins each. How much of a challenge would you like? I'll take a look and see if I have a clue fitting for your experience.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The easier the better.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: Perfect! I've got just the clue right here. Pleasure doing business with you!

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: If you can track me down again another day I will do my best to have the perfect clue for you. Good luck.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not too easy, not too hard.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: Perfect! I've got just the clue right here. Pleasure doing business with you!

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: If you can track me down again another day I will do my best to have the perfect clue for you. Good luck.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: I'm afraid this is the best I can do right now. Pleasure doing business with you!

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: If you can track me down again another day I will do my best to have the perfect clue for you. Good luck.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I like a challenge. Give me one to wrinkle my brain.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: Perfect! I've got just the clue right here. Pleasure doing business with you!

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: If you can track me down again another day I will do my best to have the perfect clue for you. Good luck.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: I'm afraid this is the best I can do right now. Pleasure doing business with you!

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: If you can track me down again another day I will do my best to have the perfect clue for you. Good luck.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Give me the hardest clue you can get your hands on.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: Perfect! I've got just the clue right here. Pleasure doing business with you!

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: If you can track me down again another day I will do my best to have the perfect clue for you. Good luck.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: I'm afraid this is the best I can do right now. Pleasure doing business with you!

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: If you can track me down again another day I will do my best to have the perfect clue for you. Good luck.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Forget it, I changed my mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Exploration? Sounds exhausting. I'm off.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: Why, hello there! Want to buy another clue scroll?

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: Perfect! I've got just the clue right here. Pleasure doing business with you!

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: If you can track me down again another day I will do my best to have the perfect clue for you. Good luck.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: Perfect! I've got just the clue right here. Pleasure doing business with you!

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: If you can track me down again another day I will do my best to have the perfect clue for you. Good luck.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: I'm afraid this is the best I can do right now. Pleasure doing business with you!

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: If you can track me down again another day I will do my best to have the perfect clue for you. Good luck.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: Perfect! I've got just the clue right here. Pleasure doing business with you!

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: If you can track me down again another day I will do my best to have the perfect clue for you. Good luck.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: I'm afraid this is the best I can do right now. Pleasure doing business with you!

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: If you can track me down again another day I will do my best to have the perfect clue for you. Good luck.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: Perfect! I've got just the clue right here. Pleasure doing business with you!

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: If you can track me down again another day I will do my best to have the perfect clue for you. Good luck.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: I'm afraid this is the best I can do right now. Pleasure doing business with you!

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: If you can track me down again another day I will do my best to have the perfect clue for you. Good luck.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: Why, hello there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about yourself.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: The name is Big Mo. I was a travelling salesman and businessman, passing through the towns to see what wares I could get my hands on.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: I turned up a few years ago, selling clue scrolls to encourage people to explore. I'd only sell each person one clue scroll per day, of course.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where were you from originally?

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: HA HA HA! I deliberately didn't tell people where I was from. Mostly they assumed me to be from Zeah.

lines.speaker: Big Mo
lines.text: That may or may not be true, though - no-one else in Zeah looks much like me. I'll leave it as a mystery...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.
